table_trans: Type of road: One digit English alphabet (according to the line on the map): (with the approval of the Tehsildar)
4. Type of road: One digit English qlee (as per the line on the map) with the approval of the Commissioner and Director Land Records, Maharashtra State, Pune)
Road number: Three-digit separate number (according to the ranking of the roads in the village) (with the approval of the Tehsildar)
Road Number: Three-digit separate number (as per the ranking of village roads) (with the approval of the Commissioner and Director Land Records, Maharashtra State, Pune)

8.2. District Signature shall be as in the accompanying Form-4. Taluka Signature shall be issued with the approval of the Divisional Commissioner and Village Signature shall be issued with the approval of the Collector and the type and number of the road shall be issued with the approval of the Tehsildar of the concerned jurisdiction.

8.2 The District Indicator shall be as in the accompanying Form-4. The Taluka Indicator, Village Indicator and Road Type and Number shall be furnished with the approval of the Commissioner and Director Land Records, State of Maharashtra, Pune.
